ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Defendant Richard Rose, Joyce Colquitt, Matthew Thompson, Yvonne Sells, Eva Williams-Phagan, &Amp; Everett Brassies Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RICHARD ROSE, JOYCE COLQUITT, MATTHEW THOMPSON, YVONNE SELLS, EVA WILLIAMS-PHAGAN and EVERETT BRASSIE's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied. The court re-affirms the prior tentative ruling and now extends it to all defendants because defendants' alleged tortious conduct directed towards plaintiff, a California resident, is sufficient to support personal jurisdiction over the defendants. (Integral Development Corp. v. Weissenbach (2002) 99 Cal.App.4th 576, 587; Anglo Irish Bank Corp., PLC v. Superior Court (2008) 165 Cal.App.4th 969, 981.) The defendants' supplemental declarations fail to show that the exercise of jurisdiction would be unreasonable or otherwise violate applicable law. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Continued To Feb-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Defendant Richard Rose, Joyce Colquitt, Matthew Thompson, Yvonne Sells, Eva Williams-Phagan, &Amp; Everett Brassies Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Continued To Jan-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Blackman of Blaxter Blackman LLP telephone number 415-500-7705 for Plaintiff Charter Asset Management Fund, L.P.
Ron Lunski of Lunski & Stimpert LLP telephone number 415-426-3525 for Defendants Zoe Learning Academy, Inc., Richard Rose, Joyce Colquitt, Matthew Thompson, Yvonne Sells, Eva Williams-Phagan and Everett Brassie.
Attorney Tina Andrews telephone number 832-647-5970 for Defendant Zoe Learning Center et al.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument the parties agreed to continue the matter and to the following briefing schedule. DEFENDANTS RICHARD ROSE, JOYCE COLQUITT, MATTHEW THOMPSON, YVONNE SELLS, EVA WILLIAMS-PHAGAN AND EVERETT BRASSIE'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is continued to January 10, 2017 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Supplemental moving papers are due by December 9, 2016. Supplemental opposition papers are due by December 20, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
